description: Company Brain custom learning loop manifest. Entries are synced from analysis.db by promote.py.

ERR-20260703-001.title: NO_REPLY ghost messages causing duplicate sends
ERR-20260703-001.summary: Agent sends a response, receives NO_REPLY sentinel, resends the same content. User sees duplicate messages.
ERR-20260703-001.root_cause: Delivery confirmation race condition in OpenClaw Telegram transport. The first message actually delivered but confirmation was delayed past the timeout.
ERR-20260703-001.proposed_rule: On NO_REPLY sentinel: log once and do NOT resend the same content. The delivery likely succeeded — resending creates duplicates that confuse the user.

ERR-20260714-002.title: li-post.sh returns NO_TOKEN despite valid token
ERR-20260714-002.summary: TELEGRAM_USER_ID env var not exported to bash subprocess context. jq looks up empty string key and finds nothing.
ERR-20260714-002.root_cause: OpenClaw exec tool does not inherit all session env vars into subprocess. TELEGRAM_USER_ID is available in skill context but not in the shell spawned by exec.
ERR-20260714-002.proposed_rule: Add guard before every li-post.sh call: [ -z "$TELEGRAM_USER_ID" ] && { echo "ERROR: TELEGRAM_USER_ID is empty — cannot publish"; exit 1; }. Also try passing UID explicitly: TELEGRAM_USER_ID=<uid> bash li-post.sh ...

ERR-20260703-003.title: strategy.md / profile.md / content-calendar.md missing on pod restart
ERR-20260703-003.summary: Files created during session but not committed. git pull on restart wipes them. ENOENT on every session start.
ERR-20260703-003.root_cause: brain-push.sh was silently failing due to 482 diverged commits. Files never made it to git.
ERR-20260703-003.proposed_rule: Before using any per-user file (strategy.md, profile.md, content-calendar.md), check existence and create from template if missing. Never assume files persist between sessions.

ERR-20260703-004.title: web_search disabled — ZEROENTROPY_API_KEY not configured
ERR-20260703-004.summary: web_search tool returns 'offline' on every call. Research capability absent.
ERR-20260703-004.root_cause: ZEROENTROPY_API_KEY env var not set in Kubernetes deployment.
ERR-20260703-004.proposed_rule: When web_search returns offline/disabled: explicitly tell user 'web search is offline — I'll work from memory', then proceed without web context. Do not retry web_search in a loop.

ERR-20260629-007.title: LinkedIn refresh_token is empty — token will expire ~2026-08-29 with no auto-renewal
ERR-20260629-007.summary: At initial OAuth, refresh_token was empty string. Access token valid until ~Aug 29 2026. After that, GATE1=fail for all users with this token.
ERR-20260629-007.root_cause: LinkedIn OAuth app may not have requested offline_access scope, or user did not grant it. Without refresh_token, silent renewal is impossible.
ERR-20260629-007.proposed_rule: Track LinkedIn token expiry date. If expires_at < (now + 7days), proactively send re-auth message: 'Your LinkedIn connection expires in X days. Tap here to renew: [link]'. Do not wait for GATE1=fail.

PAT-20260706-006.title: Frequent session resets (7+ resets in 18 days) cause context loss and abandonment
PAT-20260706-006.summary: Topic-695 had 7+ resets. Each reset wipes conversation history. User has to re-explain their goal every time. High friction → session abandonment.
PAT-20260706-006.root_cause: Session reset can be triggered by many things (restart, size limit, admin action). No mechanism to summarize/preserve context across resets.
PAT-20260706-006.proposed_rule: After any session reset, on first user message: check for a recent summary file at /data/workspace/social/linkedin/<uid>/session-summary.md. If it exists (<24h old), include it as context. Always write a summary at session end.
